mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_level_progress WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND level_id=#{levelId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_level_progress (user_id, level_id, score, passed, best_time_spent) VALUES (#{userId}, #{levelId}, #{score}, #{passed}, #{bestTimeSpent}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score=VALUES(score), passed=GREATEST(passed, VALUES(passed)), best_time_spent=IF(VALUES(best_time_spent) IS NOT NULL AND (best_time_spent IS NULL OR best_time_spent > VALUES(best_time_spent)), VALUES(best_time_spent), best_time_spent), completed_at=NOW()
